base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of leever_red_blue_variants — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Leever — red + blue palette variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Leever — red + blue palette variants; blue is faster
